spec_section.title: Door Lock Feedback Indication
spec_section.text: When central locking is activated, the body controller shall publish the final lock state within 500 ms and the HMI shall show a locked indicator after state confirmation.
spec_section.normalized_text: When central locking is activated, the body controller shall publish the final lock state within 500 ms and the HMI shall show a locked indicator after state confirmation.

note_request.title: Door lock feedback note
note_request.summary: Body controller lock state confirmation drives the HMI lock indicator.

requirement_request.title: Show locked indicator after lock state confirmation
requirement_request.statement: The HMI shall show the locked indicator after the body controller confirms the final lock state within 500 ms of central locking activation.

expected.note_summary: Body controller lock state confirmation drives the HMI lock indicator.
expected.requirement_title: Show locked indicator after lock state confirmation
